Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class STS0131AcceptanceResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.STS0131AcceptanceResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class STS0131AcceptanceResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from evaluating a depressurization run against STS0131 acceptance criteria.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final boolean

    True when all configured criteria were met.

    True when escalated fire rate criterion was configured.

    True when escalated fire rate criterion was met.

    True when remaining mass criterion was configured.

    True when pressure criterion was configured.

      Limiting evaluation time in seconds.

      Pressure at limiting time in bara.

      private final double remainingMassAtLimitingTimeKg
      Remaining mass at limiting time in kg.

      private final double peakDischargeRateKgPerS
      Peak discharge rate up to limiting time in kg/s.

      True when remaining mass criterion was configured.

      True when remaining mass criterion was met.

      private final boolean acceptable

  • Constructor Details

    • STS0131AcceptanceResult

      public STS0131AcceptanceResult(double limitingTimeS, double pressureAtLimitingTimeBara, double remainingMassAtLimitingTimeKg, double peakDischargeRateKgPerS, boolean pressureCriterionConfigured, boolean pressureCriterionMet, boolean massCriterionConfigured, boolean massCriterionMet, boolean fireRateCriterionConfigured, boolean fireRateCriterionMet, boolean acceptable)
      Creates an STS0131 acceptance result.
      Parameters:
      limitingTimeS - limiting evaluation time in s
      pressureAtLimitingTimeBara - pressure at limiting time in bara
      remainingMassAtLimitingTimeKg - remaining mass at limiting time in kg
      peakDischargeRateKgPerS - peak discharge rate up to limiting time in kg/s
      pressureCriterionConfigured - true if the pressure criterion was configured
      pressureCriterionMet - true if the pressure criterion was met
      massCriterionConfigured - true if the mass criterion was configured
      massCriterionMet - true if the remaining mass criterion was met
      fireRateCriterionConfigured - true if the fire-rate criterion was configured
      fireRateCriterionMet - true if the fire-rate criterion was met
      acceptable - true if all configured criteria were met

  • Method Details

    • getLimitingTimeS

      public double getLimitingTimeS()
      Gets the limiting evaluation time.
      Returns:
      limiting evaluation time in s

    • getPressureAtLimitingTimeBara

      public double getPressureAtLimitingTimeBara()
      Gets pressure at the limiting time.
      Returns:
      pressure in bara

    • getRemainingMassAtLimitingTimeKg

      public double getRemainingMassAtLimitingTimeKg()
      Gets remaining inventory at the limiting time.
      Returns:
      remaining inventory in kg

    • getPeakDischargeRateKgPerS

      public double getPeakDischargeRateKgPerS()
      Gets peak discharge rate up to the limiting time.
      Returns:
      peak discharge rate in kg/s

    • isPressureCriterionConfigured

      public boolean isPressureCriterionConfigured()
      Checks if the pressure criterion was configured.
      Returns:
      true if the pressure criterion was configured

    • isPressureCriterionMet

      public boolean isPressureCriterionMet()
      Checks if the pressure criterion was met.
      Returns:
      true if pressure was acceptable at the limiting time

    • isMassCriterionConfigured

      public boolean isMassCriterionConfigured()
      Checks if the remaining mass criterion was configured.
      Returns:
      true if the mass criterion was configured

    • isMassCriterionMet

      public boolean isMassCriterionMet()
      Checks if the remaining mass criterion was met.
      Returns:
      true if remaining mass was acceptable at the limiting time

    • isFireRateCriterionConfigured

      public boolean isFireRateCriterionConfigured()
      Checks if the escalated fire-rate criterion was configured.
      Returns:
      true if the fire-rate criterion was configured

    • isFireRateCriterionMet

      public boolean isFireRateCriterionMet()
      Checks if the escalated fire-rate criterion was met.
      Returns:
      true if the fire-rate criterion was met

    • isAcceptable

      public boolean isAcceptable()
      Checks if all configured criteria were met.
      Returns:
      true if the scenario is acceptable against the configured criteria

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Convert the result to a map for report generation.
      Returns:
      ordered map of result fields

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Convert the result to pretty-printed JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the result
